name: Mango Relish
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons red bell pepper (peeled), finely diced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine the mango, red bell pepper, jicama, cilantro, serrano chile, lime juice, and salt.
2. Stir until all ingredients are well mixed.
3. Keep refrigerated.
4. Serve with Black Bean-Goat Cheese Enchiladas or grilled meats or poultry.
